title: ageratina ilicifolia
intro: Ageratina ilicifolia, also known as Mexican angelica or albahaca, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the relief of symptoms associated with colds and flu. Ageratina ilicifolia is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
